name: Half Past the Apocalypse
text:
Put half a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. (Yes, half. Round toward doom when anyone asks.)
Prophecy (Predict heads or tails, then flip a coin and catch it but do not look.) Make a Prophecy on a coin you cannot see. If you guessed right, gain 6 life. If wrong, gain 3 life and put the other half of a doom counter on, completing one whole counter and a whole dread.
flavorText: The clock is half past the end. The end is half past caring.
